allow: Bash(powershell -Command 'Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3002 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Write-Host '\\''port 3002 released'\\''')
Bash(NODE_ENV=production ADMIN_EMAIL="admin@your-domain.com" ADMIN_INITIAL_PASSWORD="short" npx tsx prisma/seed.ts)
